description_long: This is a small, traditional Japanese ramen restaurant with a two-story structure. The building features a wooden slatted roof, a large cylindrical water tank on the upper level, and a balcony with a wooden railing. The front facade is adorned with a row of noren curtains displaying Japanese characters, a hanging lantern, and a counter with stools for customers. The exterior walls are a mix of white plaster and green wooden paneling, with large windows on the side and rear. Additional details include utility pipes, fire extinguishers, and a small signboard, all set within a raised wooden platform.
description: A compact, traditional Japanese ramen restaurant with a wooden roof, noren curtains, lantern, and balcony, set on a raised platform.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with noren curtains, a hanging lantern, and a row of stools at the counter.
description_view_1: The left side reveals the water tank, balcony, fire extinguishers, and a small pile of boxes near the wall.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain facade with large windows and green paneling at the base.
description_view_3: The right side features utility pipes, a hanging sign, and two upper windows, with the water tank visible on the roof.
attribute_signage: Japanese text on noren curtains at the entrance, a hanging lantern with red characters, and a small signboard on the right side.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features a wooden slatted roof, white plaster walls, and green wooden paneling at the base. Noren curtains with Japanese characters hang above the entrance, accompanied by a traditional lantern. The overall style is simple yet inviting, with natural materials and minimal ornamentation.
